hidden_defects.condition: A hash-valid PAPER portfolio snapshot could be old while summary still copied it as PASS display truth
hidden_defects.impact: dashboard could show stale cash, equity, positions, or PnL as if they were current
hidden_defects.fix: summary now carries source snapshot generated_at, age, stale threshold, and downgrades stale snapshots before values are trusted

hidden_defects.condition: verified summary portfolio rows did not require source timestamp provenance
hidden_defects.impact: operator could not tell whether dashboard portfolio values were fresh or stale
hidden_defects.fix: verified summary portfolio validation now requires timestamp and age fields and blocks stale age claims
